category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a spell checker; official GNU Aspell homepage describes it as a spell checker and library intended to replace Ispell.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is GNU Aspell; source_facts.name is aspell.
docs_sources: Official GNU Aspell homepage quick links include the Manual, which resolves to the man-html documentation.
repo_sources: Official GNU Aspell homepage links the GitHub project as an alternative location for latest source code; GitHub README says it is the Git repository for GNU Aspell.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists aspell CLI tools; source_facts.description and official homepage describe spell checking and dictionaries.
